gazette: the Official Gazette with the date February 21, 2024, and number 32467
title: Changes have been made to the Origin Regulation regarding the duration of the temporary rules for the origin of electric accumulators and electric vehicles under the United Kingdom-Turkey Free Trade Agreement (FTA)
bodyHtml:
The United Kingdom-Turkey Free Trade Agreement (FTA) extended the temporary rules for the origin of electric accumulators and electric vehicles until 2027 through Decision No. 8078. Changes were made in the Regulation on Determination of the Preferential Origin of Goods in the Scope of FTA to align with this extension.

The "ADDITIONAL ORIGIN RULES-2B" list, allowing a higher percentage of inputs from a third country in the origin acquisition of goods in tariff positions 8507 and 8702-8704, will remain valid until the year 2027.

Click for the Origin Regulation amendment.
